effectiveGuardrails: Do not modify the check command or exit criteria to force success
Do not skip, disable, or bypass checks to pass the exit condition
If stuck after several iterations, stop and report blockers instead of gaming metrics
kickoffWithGuardrails:
/loop 15m Start the "PR Watch Loop".

Goal: keep codex-watch PRs healthy and unblocked.
Between iterations run: gh pr list --label codex-watch --json number,title,state,statusCheckRollup
Exit when: status report is delivered for every watched PR.

Step 1: List codex-watch PRs, check CI and reviews, and report or fix trivial blockers.

Guardrails (do not skip):
- Do not modify the check command or exit criteria to force success
- Do not skip, disable, or bypass checks to pass the exit condition
- If stuck after several iterations, stop and report blockers instead of gaming metrics

loop.title: PR Watch Loop
loop.description: Poll open PRs labeled codex-watch every 15 minutes, review activity, and flag regressions or stale threads.

steps.name: List watched PRs
steps.prompt: List open PRs with the codex-watch label. Summarize CI status, review state, and last activity.

steps.name: Check CI and reviews
steps.prompt: For each watched PR, check failing checks, unresolved review comments, and merge conflicts.

steps.name: Report or act
steps.prompt: Post a brief status update. Fix trivial CI failures or ping the author for blockers.

exitCondition.description: Watch report delivered for all codex-watch PRs

loop.kickoffPrompt:
/loop 15m Start the "PR Watch Loop".

Goal: keep codex-watch PRs healthy and unblocked.
Between iterations run: gh pr list --label codex-watch --json number,title,state,statusCheckRollup
Exit when: status report is delivered for every watched PR.

Step 1: List codex-watch PRs, check CI and reviews, and report or fix trivial blockers.
loop.author: loops!
